details.test: Task 1: Cheapest monthly coaching plan under $40 with >=2 sessions and start trial
Task 2: Join intermediate 30-day productivity challenge with daily email tips
Task 3: Complete Life Balance Quiz and save focus-area note
Task 4: Create 30-minute morning routine with 4 activities and pin to dashboard
Task 5: Save two motivation articles under 8 minutes to reading list
Task 6: Set up weekly reminders Mon/Wed/Fri at 07:00 via email
Task 7: Enroll in beginner mini-course under $50 with more lessons
Task 8: Add confidence strategies from career growth stories to My Plan
Task 9: Submit billing question about refund policy via contact form
